title: Bounded Public Mutation-Seam Host And Ingress Scaffolding Execution
objective: Land the smallest repo-owned public mutation-seam host scaffold plus the same-origin operations-web ingress contract needed for the re-homed PM surfaces to resolve `/api/v1/{reads,schedule,mutations}` without reopening source-local API-origin remediation.
decision_rationale: Packet 029 established that the remaining blocker is no longer stale frontend source; it is the absence of a public mutation-seam host and ingress contract for the PM `reads`, `schedule`, and `mutations` routes.

The re-homed PM pages already correctly call same-origin `/api/v1/*`, so the smallest root fix is not another page edit; it is an ingress layer in `apps/operations-web` plus a concrete public-host deployment contract for `apps/mutation-seam`.
The adjacent `apps/control-plane-api` surface already provides a proven Render-host plus deployed-smoke pattern that can be mirrored without widening into unrelated platform or browser-shell work.

`apps/mutation-seam` imports cleanly and already exposes `/health`, `/api/v1/reads/*`, `/api/v1/schedule/*`, and `/api/v1/mutations/*`, so the missing boundary is deploy-and-ingress scaffolding rather than immediate application repair.
execution_summary: Added same-origin rewrite rules in `apps/operations-web/next.config.ts` for `/api/v1/reads/:path*`, `/api/v1/schedule/:path*`, and `/api/v1/mutations/:path*`, keyed by the server-side environment variable `MUTATION_SEAM_BASE_URL`.
Added `apps/mutation-seam/render.yaml` as the first repo-owned public-host blueprint targeting `https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com`.

Added `apps/mutation-seam/scripts/smoke_deployed_mutation_seam.py` and `.github/workflows/deployed-mutation-seam-smoke.yml` as the deployed-host validation path for the public seam routes used by the PM surfaces.
Added `apps/mutation-seam/DEPLOYMENT_VALIDATION.md` and updated adjacent deployment docs so the new host plus ingress contract is explicit and repeatable.

validation.editor_error_sweep: next.config.ts, render.yaml, smoke_deployed_mutation_seam.py, deployed-mutation-seam-smoke.yml -> No errors found

next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 031 - Bounded Public Mutation-Seam Hosted Deployment And Public PM Live-Data Proof
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06 as a bounded scaffolding packet. Packet 030 lands the missing repo-owned host and ingress contract but does not claim that `https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com` is already deployed or that public PM live-data proof has already passed.
next_action: Execute Packet 031 as the smallest hosted deployment and post-deploy PM live-data proof slice once the Render and Vercel environment changes can be applied.
